notes: SHIP v1.14.282 - LOG SHEET + retire #omni-bar (Ship 1 of HANDOFF-SHIP1-COMPOSER-SHEET, re-scoped by owner). KEY FINDING that reshaped the ship: the handoff assumed no live redesign log composer (it audited #action-stripe, already dead under rd, and the removed today_quickLog). But #omni-bar / omni_submit() IS a live redesign-visible deployment-scoped log bar doing exactly what the new sheet was spec'd to do (Log to <active dep> placeholder, disabled no-deployment state, 500-cap, writes deploy_logAudit(id,'OMNI_NOTE','deployment',id,text)). Building the sheet alongside it = a 'one door per feature' hard-rule violation. Owner ruled #2: build the sheet AND retire omni-bar (re-home, not duplicate). WHAT SHIPPED (redesign-only; ?legacy=1 byte-identical): (1) #log-sheet bottom sheet reusing the .va-sheet chrome classes (grabber/header/close), with LOG-specific controls only: destination line, textarea maxlength 500, Attach/Scan/Voice as VISIBLY-DISABLED stubs (No-Silent-Failures: look disabled not broken), full-width SEND, and a hidden route chip to Work shown only in the no-deployment state. (2) openLogSheet()/closeLogSheet()/logSheet_send() on the classList('visible') convention; initSheetDismiss('log-sheet','.va-sheet-inner',closeLogSheet) reused (self-guards via dataset._swipeInit). SEND writes deploy_logAudit(id,'OMNI_NOTE','deployment',id,text) - byte-identical to omni_submit, lands in the same FIELD NOTE feed (audit.filter action==='OMNI_NOTE'); NO new storage path, NO new audit vocabulary. (3) TRIGGER: the LEFT askrow RESERVED .rpill replaced WHOLESALE with a LOG .apill (ls-pill, pencil glyph, openLogSheet()) per the RESERVED-SLOT hard rule - never a handler bolted on a placeholder; the RIGHT rpill stays (Ship 4 owns it). (4) OMNI-BAR RETIREMENT under rd: body.rd #omni-bar{display:none!important} (legacy keeps the bar); dropped the phase-dock :has(#omni-bar:not(.omni-inactive)) +--omni-h offset (@9031) so the dock sits directly above the nav; tightened #pg-cmd padding-bottom +76px -> +20px (@9176) since there is no longer a 57px bar to clear. The phdock_render --omni-h measurement and mscope_open's .omni-inactive toggle are left as-is (inert while the bar is hidden; still used by legacy). DEVIATIONS from spec (reported): (a) SEND path is a single deploy_logAudit() call, NOT the spec's load->push->hash->save (that would duplicate the C4 tamper-evident chaining and risk breaking the hash); (b) destination action is OMNI_NOTE/deployment (the existing deployment-scoped token), NOT the spec-implied RACK_NOTE (rack-scoped) or a new token; (c) the whole omni-bar retirement was NOT in the spec's edit plan - it followed from the one-door finding and the owner's #2 ruling. GATES: node --check on all extracted <script> blocks pass; CSS braces balanced; CRLF preserved (0 bare LF); three-stamp .281->.282. HEADLESS VERIFIED (puppeteer-core driving installed Chrome over the local .282, real layout): 390px -> horizontalOverflow 0, #omni-bar display:none (retired), askrow = 3 equal tiles 103x119 at x=30/143/257 (ASK/LOG/RESERVED, no overlap, centered), LOG pill 'Field note' lays out identically to the ASK pill; #log-sheet opens display:flex with NO ACTIVE DEPLOYMENT + SEND disabled (correct no-deploy state) + 56px SEND + textarea + 3 disabled stubs. 1080px -> overflow 0, omni-bar none, askrow 3 equal 317x98 row on the 1080 column. Only the pencil-glyph appearance was not pixel-captured (#pg-cmd is an inner scroll pane, so fullPage stops at the trow); geometry confirmed. John device-verify remains the gate. DEVICE VERIFY (John, iPhone): LOG reachable in one tap from Command (askrow LOG pill, left slot); sheet opens smoothly, destination shows the ACTIVE deployment; with no active deployment the sheet shows NO ACTIVE DEPLOYMENT + disabled SEND + a route chip to Work; swipe-down and scrim-tap dismiss; SEND lands an entry indistinguishable from a field note (OMNI_NOTE) in the audit; the persistent LOG bar (#omni-bar) is GONE under redesign; bottom nav untouched/tappable; Command page has no dead gap where the bar was; all controls >=56px one-handed; ?legacy=1 renders byte-identical (omni-bar AND #action-stripe present in legacy). OUT OF FENCE (flagged, not acted on): other rd pages that reserved bottom space for omni-bar may show a minor extra gap (only #pg-cmd was explicitly reserved and is fixed); the second RESERVED rpill still unnamed (Ship 4). NEXT: Ship 2 (NBA paint order) - do not touch this ship's column order.
